description: Validate a composed Codex pet 8x9 spritesheet atlas: dimensions, format, alpha channel, used/unused cell occupancy, and transparent-RGB residue (read-only).
rules: read-only — never writes the atlas, only a JSON report
expects a 1536x1872 PNG or WebP atlas (8 columns x 9 rows of 192x208 cells)
report written to record_store as atlas-validation.json
usage: Set ATLAS (path to the atlas PNG/WebP). Output: atlas-validation.json (ok, errors, warnings, per-cell occupancy).
limitation: Read-only QA only. Does not repair or recompose the atlas. Requires Pillow (PIL); without it the porter writes a placeholder report.
